name: Jc's Credit Repair
description_short: JC's Credit Repair disputes inaccurate items on credit reports to help consumers improve their credit scores. Based in Houston, they offer free consultations and claim to increase scores within 45 days.
description_long:
JC's Credit Repair is a credit repair company based in Houston, Texas, operating from a physical location at 5414 Pardee Street. The company focuses on helping consumers identify and dispute errors and unfair negative items on their credit reports with the goal of improving credit scores. They position themselves as an alternative to consumers attempting credit repair independently, emphasizing the time-intensive and patience-heavy nature of the dispute process.

The company's core service is analyzing credit reports for inaccurate information, disputing those items with credit bureaus and creditors, and managing the back-and-forth documentation required throughout the dispute process. They claim to have staff trained on recent credit reporting laws, statutes, and practices, and position their expertise around identifying which items on a report most significantly impact credit scores. They offer a free initial consultation to assess a consumer's credit situation before committing to services. Current promotions include a 10% discount for new customers.

JC's Credit Repair distinguishes itself by maintaining a physical office location where customers can meet in person during business hours, offering a more traditional service model compared to some purely online competitors. They emphasize personal assessment and direct contact with creditors on behalf of clients, suggesting a hands-on approach rather than purely automated dispute filing.

A significant caveat is that the company's marketing includes the claim "INCREASE YOUR CREDIT SCORE IN 45 DAYS," which the website itself contradicts by stating that "credit repair companies cannot help you fix your credit overnight, or guarantee the removal of accurately reported items." This creates tension between their promotional messaging and their own disclaimer about realistic expectations. The website content is sparse on pricing details, specific success metrics, or detailed explanation of their dispute methodology.
pros: Offers free initial consultation to assess credit situation before committing to paid services
Physical office location in Houston available for in-person meetings during business hours
Claims staff training on recent laws, statutes, and credit reporting practices
Provides ongoing support including contact with creditors and document management on client's behalf
Current 10% discount promotion for new customers trying their services
Website includes accurate disclaimer that credit repair cannot guarantee removal of accurate items or overnight results
Two phone numbers provided for accessibility (832) 286-5766 and (214) 830-7166
cons: Marketing claims 'INCREASE YOUR CREDIT SCORE IN 45 DAYS' but website also disclaims companies cannot guarantee results—messaging is contradictory
No pricing information published on website; customers must contact for quotes
Minimal detail provided on specific methodology, success rates, or average timeline for actual results
Website contains placeholder content and appears poorly maintained (e.g., 'filler@godaddy.com' visible, repetitive sections)
No information on licensing, certifications, legal compliance, or regulatory standing
best_for: Consumers with disputes about inaccurate negative items on their credit reports who want professional representation
People in the Houston area who prefer to work with companies they can meet with in person
Individuals seeking help disputing errors without doing the dispute filing and follow-up work themselves
diagnosis: JC's Credit Repair is best for Houston-area consumers who want professional assistance disputing inaccurate items on their credit reports and prefer working with a local, in-person credit repair company. The main caveat is that their marketing promise of 45-day results contradicts their own disclaimer that credit repair companies cannot guarantee results, suggesting consumers should have realistic expectations and get detailed information about pricing and timeline before engaging.
services: Free consultation and credit report assessment
Analysis of credit reports for inaccurate or unfair items
Disputing inaccurate items with credit bureaus
Contacting creditors on behalf of clients
Managing documentation and correspondence between client and creditors/bureaus
In-person service available at physical office location
